## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New paper, finding, or comparison record
- [ ] New vertical slice (task family / protocol / dataset / adapter)
- [ ] Adapter or analysis change to an existing slice
- [ ] Site / web change (Astro, Svelte, styling)
- [ ] Tooling (CLI, validation, schema, CI, scripts)

## Provenance and validation

<!-- Mark anything that doesn't apply N/A. -->

- [ ] `bash scripts/ci.sh` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run behavtaskatlas validate` reports the expected record count.
- [ ] New analyses write a JSON provenance payload alongside their output.
- [ ] No `data/raw/**` paths leak into committed JSON or HTML.
- [ ] `INSIGHTS.md` updated with any meaningful design / scope decision.
